description: Time-to-exploit per CVE-publication year, backing the tteChart on docs/dashboard.html. TTE = dateAdded (CISA KEV) - cve_published_date (NVD/OSV).

methodology.exclusion_rationale: 2025/2026 excluded due to insufficient N and right-censoring — recently-published CVEs that haven't been added to KEV yet might still be added later, biasing current-year medians artificially low.
methodology.negative_tte_skipped: rare data anomalies where dateAdded < published
